reviews.comment:
Buena atención,  por ser YPF Full mi opinión sobre los baños de damas no es muy favorable, pequeños y cuando fui no tan bien aseados,  es la 1* vez que en una Full me sucede esto

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but since it's a YPF Full station, my opinion of the women's restrooms isn't very favorable. They're small and not very clean when I went; it's the first time this has happened to me at a Full station.
